title: Timelord Adventures
description: A Doctor Who modpack built mostly for aesthetics.
body:
### Timelord Adventures, A Vanilla+ Modpack with only one mod in mind.
<!-- PNG version -->
[![Modrinth-Gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/timelord-adventures/gallery)[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/5CA8sewarU)
[![paypal-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-plural_64h.png)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MystixMew)
### What kind of Mods are included in Timelord Adventures?
> Timelord Adventures is based around one server & client side mod known as [Adventures In Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/ait), Timelord Adventures has many client-side mods such as [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Xaero's Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) plus many more client-side mods.

### What makes Timelord Adventures unique compared to other modpacks?
> Timelord Adventures was built with the intent of having a **Vanilla+ Environment** for Doctor Who fans, Although the only mod Timelord Adventures has is [Adventures In Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/ait) I have added many client-side mods for aesthetics, For example mods like [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) for custom player models, and [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) for shaders.

### Here is some information you should know about Timelord Adventures.
> I recommend a **minimum of 4-8GB of RAM** on your instance of this modpack.
> I recommend a **minimum of 6-8GB of RAM** for a server on this modpack.
